message:
feat(transport): weight-aware select_n for WeightedRoundRobin load balancing

LoadBalancer::select_n for WeightedRoundRobin previously fell back
to unweighted round-robin (ignoring endpoint weights entirely).

Fix: New weighted_endpoint_index_for_slot() maps a counter position
into the cumulative weight ring, and select_n_weighted_round_robin()
uses it to advance through the ring for each selection, producing
a weight-proportional distribution across endpoints.

Tests:
- test_load_balancer_weighted_round_robin_select_n_honors_weight_ring:
  weight-5 endpoint receives proportionally more selections than
  weight-1 endpoints across two select_n(3) calls.
- test_symbol_router_multicast_weighted_round_robin_respects_weights_across_calls:
  end-to-end through SymbolDispatcher verifying weight distribution
  across multiple multicast calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
